error.signature: tf2.LookupException: "map" passed to lookupTransform argument target_frame does not exist
error.regex: (tf2.*LookupException|lookupTransform.*does not exist|Could not find a connection between)

verdict.summary: TF2 cannot find the requested frame. The frame publisher is not running or publishing to the wrong topic.

dead_ends.action: Add a sleep/retry loop waiting for the transform
dead_ends.why_fails: Masks a configuration error; if the frame publisher is misconfigured the transform never appears

dead_ends.action: Hardcode the transform as a 4x4 matrix instead of using TF2
dead_ends.why_fails: Defeats TF2 purpose, breaks when robot moves, unmaintainable

dead_ends.action: Increase TF buffer cache time to very large values
dead_ends.why_fails: The frame was never published, not expired from cache

workarounds.action: Run ros2 run tf2_tools view_frames to visualize the TF tree
workarounds.how: ros2 run tf2_tools view_frames  # generates frames.pdf

workarounds.action: Check frame_id strings match exactly (no leading slash in ROS 2)
workarounds.how: ROS 2 TF2 does NOT use leading slashes: use 'map' not '/map'

workarounds.action: Launch static_transform_publisher for missing static frames
workarounds.how: ros2 run tf2_ros static_transform_publisher 0 0 0 0 0 0 parent child
